name: Chocolate Chunk Cookies
recipeIngredient: 6 ounces Andes Candies, any flavor, coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Stir together flour, baking powder and baking soda; set aside.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat butter and sugars until light. Beat in vanilla and eggs.
4. Gradually stir in flour mixture, then Andes candies, walnuts and raisins.
5. Drop dough by tablespoonfuls onto an ungreased baking sheet.
6. Bake in the preheated oven for 7-8 minutes or until cookies brown.
7. Remove from oven and let cool on the sheet for 2-3 minutes. For thicker cookies, chill the dough for 15-20 minutes before baking.
